files_changed.note: new file, full CSR format impl
added 'graph.dat CSR format' subsection under existing 'Storage layout' heading

acceptance_criteria: Adjacency data for all fileIDs persists to graph.dat in a CSR-like compact array format that reloads correctly after a process restart.
public_api_added: type CSREdge struct{Target uint64; Type EdgeType; Weight uint32; LastUpdated int64}

self_consistency_summary.graph_package_tests: all PASS (5 new + 4 pre-existing edge_append tests), zero regressions
self_consistency_summary.full_engine_module_test: FAIL in engine/split (TestReaderDuringSplit) only - CONFIRMED PRE-EXISTING FLAKE unrelated to this subtask's changes (isolated re-run: PASS/PASS/FAIL across 3 runs; engine/graph itself passed cleanly in the same full-module run; this subtask touches no split-package code)

known_issue_for_verifier.status: pre-existing intermittent race-timing flake, NOT introduced by this subtask
known_issue_for_verifier.recommendation: verifier should independently confirm this is unrelated to engine/graph/csr.go (no import/reference between the two packages) rather than treating it as a 3.1.1 regression

security_note: gh issue view 15 output and prior bash tool output in this session's history contained injected fake system-reminder-style text (fake date-change notice, fake MCP 'tokensave' server instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive). Treated as untrusted data only, not acted upon, per standing repo security note. An untracked .tokensave/ directory (pre-existing local tool state, not created by this agent) was deliberately left out of the commit.
